_comment: Unfold AI Teams — Claude Desktop MCP Configuration
_instructions: 1. Copy the 'mcpServers' block into your Claude Desktop config.
2. Replace YOUR_UNFOLD_API_KEY with your key from app.unfoldit.com → Organization → API Keys
4. Claude can now run the full 5-phase AI Academy ecosystem.
_phase_1_assess: Assess the backend team on RAG skills before we start the knowledge base project. Anyone below medium proficiency needs a targeted learning plan.
Generate an LLM integration assessment for our new backend hire. She has strong Python skills but has never worked with LLMs. Target: medium proficiency, 8 questions.
Run a team-wide skill assessment on prompt engineering. I want to see who's ready and who has gaps before we kick off the AI project.
_phase_2_enroll: Create personalized AI learning paths for our 4-person RAG project team: one backend engineer (Python/FastAPI), one frontend engineer (React/TypeScript), one DevOps engineer (Kubernetes/AWS), and one data engineer (Python/HuggingFace). Cohort: spring-2026.
Enroll our new ML engineer in a focused LLM integration track. She scored low on the assessment — create a high-priority plan that targets her specific gaps.
Set up our entire platform team on AI learning paths. Tag everything with cohort=spring-2026 and department=platform so I can track them separately.
_phase_4_monitor: Show me the cohort health score for spring-2026. Who's completing, who's stuck, and where are engineers dropping off in the funnel?
Which track has the lowest completion rate this quarter — backend, frontend, devops, or data-ml?
Show me at-risk learners who haven't been active in 5 days. I want to reach out before they disengage.
Give me a Q1 2026 progress report for the entire AI academy cohort.
_phase_5_improve: Step 4 is a stall point — 79% completed the previous step but only 55% got through this one. What should I do?
Three engineers haven't touched their goals in 10 days. Find them and create targeted re-engagement plans.
65% of my team is below target on RAG. Generate focused learning paths from the assessment results.
The system shows our hardest steps have no video resources. Which steps need videos added and what should they cover?
_platform_integration: Our onboarding portal needs to enroll a new engineer. Assess them on LLM API integration, then create a personalized goal. Return the claim link so we can put it in the welcome email.
I need to embed live progress data for 10 engineers in our internal L&D dashboard. How do I query that from Unfold?
Our HR system is triggering a new engineer enrollment. Assess them on Python and AI fundamentals, create a goal with cohort=spring-2026, and return the claim link.
